name: Baker Street Funding - Lawsuit Loans, Pre-Settlement Funding and Litigation Funding
description_short: Baker Street Funding - Lawsuit Loans, Pre-Settlement Funding and Litigation Funding is a credit repair provider based in New York, New York. Rated 4.4/5 with 91 Google reviews, reflecting strong customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Baker Street Funding - Lawsuit Loans, Pre-Settlement Funding and Litigation Funding is a credit repair provider serving clients in New York, New York. Carrying a 4.4/5.0 Google rating from 91 reviews, Baker Street Funding - Lawsuit Loans, Pre-Settlement Funding and Litigation Funding has an strong reputation among consumers in the New York area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a loan agency, legal services, Baker Street Funding - Lawsuit Loans, Pre-Settlement Funding and Litigation Funding provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in New York, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Baker Street Funding - Lawsuit Loans, Pre-Settlement Funding and Litigation Funding operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the New York, New York area who are considering Baker Street Funding - Lawsuit Loans, Pre-Settlement Funding and Litigation Funding should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
